task_description: Write a friendly tweet announcing our new AI tool
output_a: 🚀 Meet our new AI assistant — it saves you hours every week. Try it free today!

task_description: Summarise the plot of Cinderella in one sentence
output_a: A mistreated young woman attends a royal ball with magical help and wins the prince's heart, later identified by a lost glass slipper.
output_b: Cinderella is a story about a girl.

task_description: Explain what an API is to a non-technical reader
output_a: An API is like a waiter: it takes your request to the kitchen, then brings back exactly what you asked for — without you needing to know how the kitchen works.
output_b: An API is an application programming interface used by software.
